message:
Command `# Good progress - reached step 35 (CutRows). 
# Flow is well past the GPL-0326 point - the port fix worked!
# Now monitor at a higher level - check every 3 minutes
sleep 180
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_resume2.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended - check for completion/error"
echo "---latest steps---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/ | sort -V | tail -5
echo "---log tail---"
tail -8 /tmp/pnr_resume2.log` executed with exit code -1.
